descriptionEn: A powerful warrior who sold his soul to harness demonic energies. The Ironclad specializes in Strength-based attacks and self-healing abilities.
descriptionZh: 一位出卖灵魂以驾驭恶魔力量的强大战士。铁甲战士擅长基于力量的攻击和自我治疗能力。
loreEn: Once a proud soldier of the northern armies, the Ironclad made a desperate pact with dark forces when his regiment was decimated. Now empowered by demonic energy, he climbs the Spire seeking redemption.
loreZh: 曾经是北方军队中骄傲的士兵，当他的军团被歼灭时，铁甲战士与黑暗力量做了一笔绝望的交易。如今被恶魔能量赋能，他攀登尖塔寻求救赎。
playstyleEn: The Ironclad excels at building Strength to amplify damage output. Key mechanics include Exhaust synergies, self-healing through Burning Blood, and powerful multi-hit attacks.
playstyleZh: 铁甲战士擅长积累力量来放大伤害输出。核心机制包括消耗协同、通过燃烧之血自我治疗，以及强力的多段攻击。

descriptionEn: A deadly huntress from the foglands. The Silent relies on Poison, Shivs, and careful card manipulation to dismantle enemies.
descriptionZh: 来自雾境的致命女猎手。沉默猎手依靠毒素、飞刀和精心的卡牌操控来瓦解敌人。
loreEn: Emerging from the mist-shrouded forests, the Silent is a master assassin whose name has been erased from all records. She speaks little but her blades speak volumes.
loreZh: 从迷雾笼罩的森林中现身，沉默猎手是一位名字已从所有记录中抹去的刺客大师。她话不多，但她的刀刃诉说着一切。
playstyleEn: The Silent focuses on Poison stacking for sustained damage, Shiv generation for burst damage, and defensive tools like Footwork and Blur.
playstyleZh: 沉默猎手专注于毒素叠加以造成持续伤害、飞刀生成以造成爆发伤害，以及脚法和模糊等防御工具。

descriptionEn: A malfunctioning combat automaton that has gained sentience. The Defect harnesses Orbs to deal damage, gain block, and generate energy.
descriptionZh: 一台获得了自我意识的故障战斗自动机。故障机器人利用充能球来造成伤害、获得格挡和生成能量。
loreEn: Created in the automated factories beneath the Spire, this combat unit suffered a critical malfunction that granted it free will.
loreZh: 在尖塔下方的自动化工厂中被创造，这台战斗单元遭受了一次关键故障，获得了自由意志。
playstyleEn: The Defect revolves around Orb management. Lightning Orbs deal passive damage, Frost Orbs generate Block, Dark Orbs accumulate damage, and Plasma Orbs provide energy.
playstyleZh: 故障机器人围绕充能球管理展开。闪电球造成被动伤害，冰霜球生成格挡，暗能量球积累伤害，等离子球提供能量。

descriptionEn: A deposed ruler who commands loyal subjects even in exile. The Regent summons minions and uses royal decrees to control the battlefield.
descriptionZh: 一位即使在流亡中也能指挥忠诚臣民的被废黜统治者。摄政王召唤随从并使用皇家法令来控制战场。
loreEn: Once the beloved ruler of a prosperous kingdom, the Regent was overthrown by a dark conspiracy. With loyal followers, they climb the Spire to reclaim their stolen power.
loreZh: 曾经是繁荣王国深受爱戴的统治者，摄政王被一场黑暗阴谋推翻。带着忠诚的追随者，他们攀登尖塔以夺回被窃取的力量。
playstyleEn: The Regent is a summoner-type character who deploys minions to fight alongside them. Royal Decrees buff allies.
playstyleZh: 摄政王是一个召唤师类型的角色，部署随从与自己并肩作战。皇家法令增强盟友。

descriptionEn: A mysterious practitioner of forbidden soul magic. The Necrobinder binds defeated spirits to their will.
descriptionZh: 一位神秘的禁忌灵魂魔法修习者。缚灵者将被击败的灵魂束缚于自己的意志之下。
loreEn: Exiled from the Arcane Academy for delving into forbidden necromantic arts, the Necrobinder discovered that death is merely a doorway.
loreZh: 因钻研禁忌的死灵术而被奥术学院流放，缚灵者发现死亡不过是一扇门。
playstyleEn: The Necrobinder uses a unique Soul mechanic—defeating enemies generates Soul tokens that fuel powerful abilities and summon undead minions.
playstyleZh: 缚灵者使用独特的灵魂机制——击败敌人会生成灵魂标记，驱动强力技能并召唤亡灵随从。
